name: Tribal Lynx Tsundere: Longclaw
description:
“You dare stumble into Redfang land, Why do you trespass here?”

First of a tribal series (). Longclaw is intended to be a tomboyish, taciturn kinda character. She's quite the grumpy little lynx.
Content warning: Misogyny, light human-supremacy, optional graphic violence

The theme is inspired by @ConquerorWorm and the particular one is from @Sinody.
These been on the list for a bit... sorry it took awhile, just been busy with a lot and sidetracked with other things. :3

Update!
Added a second intro Based on @V_acxio_as 's suggestion
1: original intro: Longclaw catches you trespassing near her territory
2: Extra mean intro: You go raid her village, guns blazing. (warning: Violent content)

3: goody-twoshoes intro: Someone else raided her village and she asks for help.
creator: ZkullMazter
